---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a missing CSS property or new capability
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

What CSS property or feature is missing?

## CSS reference

Link to the CSS spec or MDN page for the property, e.g.:
- https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/flex-basis

## Use case

Describe the layout you're trying to build and why the current API doesn't support it.

## Proposed API

How would you like the Swift API to look?

```swift
// Example:
Text("Label").flexItem(minWidth: .points(80))
```

## Alternatives considered

Any workaround you've tried.
